types.name: ActionProposal
docs: Account storing an action proposal initiated by the manager
Uses rejection-based voting: action is approved by default after timelock
unless enough reject votes are cast to block it

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this proposal belongs to

fields.name: proposal_id
docs: Unique proposal ID within the vault

fields.name: proposer
docs: Manager who created the proposal

fields.name: action_data
docs: Serialized ProposalAction data

fields.name: created_at
docs: Timestamp when proposal was created

fields.name: voting_ends_at
docs: Timestamp when voting ends

fields.name: timelock_seconds
docs: Timelock duration after voting passes (seconds)

fields.name: executable_at
docs: Timestamp when proposal can be executed (after voting + timelock)

fields.name: status
docs: Current status of the proposal

fields.name: reject_votes
docs: Total LP tokens staked for rejection

fields.name: opt_out_votes
docs: Total LP tokens staked for opt-out

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: lp_supply_snapshot
docs: LP supply when proposal voting started

fields.name: rejection_required_snapshot
docs: Reject-vote threshold frozen when proposal voting started

fields.name: reserved
docs: Reserved for future use

types.name: AllowedSettingsChange
docs: Defines which settings changes are allowed by the policy

types.name: ClmmPositionEntry
docs: Tracks a concentrated liquidity position on exponent_clmm for AUM calculation.
The position's value is the proportional share of pooled PT and SY, priced via
price_id_pt and price_id_sy respectively.

fields.name: lp_position
docs: The LpPosition keypair account from exponent_clmm

fields.name: market
docs: The MarketThree account this position belongs to

fields.name: price_id_pt
docs: Price ID for the PT token, used to convert PT amounts to base value

fields.name: price_id_sy
docs: Price ID for the SY token, used to convert SY amounts to base value

fields.name: nav_aum_circuit_breaker_state
docs: NAV AUM circuit-breaker baseline storage.
This remains a compact `[u8; 32]` because it reuses the former reserved
address lookup table slot, preserving the serialized vault layout.

fields.name: squads_settings
docs: Squads settings account pubkey (configuration, policies, signers)
Derived as ["smart_account", "settings", seed]

fields.name: squads_vault
docs: Squads vault account pubkey (holds funds, signs CPIs)
Derived as ["smart_account", settings_key, "smart_account", account_index]

fields.name: token_entries
docs: Token entries for deposits/withdrawals

fields.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying mint used to validate all price references on this vault

fields.name: mint_lp
docs: Mint for the market's LP tokens

fields.name: token_lp_escrow
docs: Holds the LP tokens that are earning emissions
This is where LP holders "stake" their LP tokens

fields.name: normal_withdrawal_cut_bp
docs: Standard withdrawal fee charged in LP basis points.

fields.name: fee_treasury
docs: Fee treasury account for collecting fees in LP tokens

fields.name: self_address
docs: Authority for CPI calls owned by the market struct

fields.name: signer_bump
docs: Bump for signing the PDA

fields.name: strategy_positions
docs: Strategy positions for AUM calculation (orderbook entries, token accounts, etc.)

fields.name: seed_id
docs: Unique seed id for the vault

fields.name: roles
docs: Role memberships for managing vault behavior and risk

fields.name: proposal_vote_config
docs: Configuration for proposal voting system

fields.name: reserves_config
docs: Reserves configuration (share of tokens in reserves, etc.)

types.name: KaminoObligationEntry
docs: Entry for Kamino lending obligation.

fields.name: obligation
docs: Kamino obligation account pubkey.

fields.name: lending_program_id
docs: Program id expected to own the obligation account.

fields.name: quote_price_id
docs: Quote->base price used after reserve amounts are valued into the
obligation quote mint.

fields.name: reserve_price_mappings
docs: Required reserve allowlist for every active deposit/borrow reserve.

fields.name: reserve_farm_mappings
docs: Stored reserve->farm mappings for KLend delegated farms.

fields.name: min_price_status_flags
docs: Minimum Kamino price-status flags required in last_update.

types.name: LimitedQuantityConstraints
docs: Limited subset of QuantityConstraints

types.name: LimitedSpendingLimit
docs: Limited subset of BalanceConstraint used to create a policy

types.name: LimitedTimeConstraints
docs: Limited subset of TimeConstraints

types.name: LoopscaleLoanEntry
docs: Tracks a Loopscale Loan account (BORROWER side).
A Loan is a borrowing position where the vault has deposited collateral
and borrowed principal from someone else's strategy. This is the opposite
of a Strategy position (where the vault is the lender).
AUM = collateral_value - outstanding_debt (net equity of the position).
The loan contains up to 5 collateral slots and 5 ledger (borrow) slots.

types.name: LoopscaleStrategyEntry
docs: Tracks a Loopscale Strategy account (LENDER side).
A Strategy is a lending position where the vault deposits capital that
earns yield from borrowers. The strategy automatically deploys capital
into loans. AUM includes undeployed principal (`token_balance`),
deployed capital (`current_deployed_amount`), and accrued interest
(`outstanding_interest_amount`) — all read directly from the strategy account.

types.name: ObligationType
docs: Obligation type (e.g. USDC borrows, USDC deposits)

types.name: OrderbookEntry
docs: List of user_escrows and offer_idxs in diffrent orderbooks

fields.name: user_escrow_idx
docs: Legacy field retained for layout compatibility.
Actual offer ownership is derived from the orderbook offer node's
user-escrow owner at AUM time.

types.name: Permissions
docs: Bitmask for permissions.

types.name: PolicyConfig
docs: Configuration for creating a new policy using Squads types directly

fields.name: payload
docs: The policy creation payload from Squads

fields.name: threshold
docs: Threshold for policy approval

fields.name: time_lock
docs: Time lock in seconds

fields.name: start_timestamp
docs: Optional start timestamp

fields.name: expiration
docs: Optional expiration

types.name: PolicyCreationPayload
docs: Unified enum for all policy creation payloads
These are used in SettingsAction::PolicyCreate to specify which type of policy to create

types.name: PositionUpdate
docs: Types of position updates

fields.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint of the TokenAccount position in strategy_positions

fields.name: balance
docs: Token account itself must be provided in `ctx.remaining_accounts`

fields.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint of the TokenAccount position in strategy_positions

fields.name: token_account
docs: Token account to remove

fields.name: obligation
docs: Existing Kamino obligation pubkey to update

fields.name: reserve_price_mappings
docs: Reserve mappings to update or append. If the reserve already exists, it is replaced.

fields.name: reserve_farm_mappings
docs: Post-update reserve->farm mappings. Verified against `remaining_accounts`
in the handler; rejected on mismatch. The caller must provide the exact
set that the handler would derive from the live Reserve + FarmState
accounts (any order; the handler normalizes before comparing).

types.name: PriceId
docs: Price calculation method for token account and orderbook positions

types.name: PriceType
docs: Type of price source

types.name: ProgramConfig
docs: Global program configuration account.

types.name: ProgramInteractionPolicyCreationPayload
docs: Payload used to create a program interaction policy

types.name: ProposalParams
docs: Parameters for creating an action proposal

fields.name: voting_period_seconds
docs: Voting period in seconds (uses vault default if None)

fields.name: timelock_seconds
docs: Timelock after voting passes in seconds (uses vault default if None)

types.name: ProposalStatus
docs: Status of an action proposal

types.name: ProposalVoteConfig
docs: Configuration for proposal voting system (rejection-based)
Policies are approved by default after timelock unless rejected

fields.name: min_voting_period_seconds
docs: Minimum voting period in seconds

fields.name: max_voting_period_seconds
docs: Maximum voting period in seconds

fields.name: default_voting_period_seconds
docs: Default voting period in seconds

fields.name: default_timelock_seconds
docs: Timelock duration after voting period ends (seconds)
Policy becomes executable after voting_ends_at + timelock

fields.name: rejection_threshold_bps
docs: Rejection threshold in basis points (BPS_PRECISION = 1e6 = 100%)
If reject_votes >= threshold% of total LP supply, proposal is rejected
e.g., 330_000 = 33% of LP supply must vote reject to block

fields.name: next_proposal_id
docs: Counter for next proposal ID

fields.name: voting_enabled
docs: Whether proposal voting is enabled

fields.name: live_proposals_count
docs: Number of currently live proposals (Active + Approved).

fields.name: max_concurrent_live_proposals
docs: Maximum number of concurrent live proposals allowed.

fields.name: reserved
docs: Reserved for future use

fields.name: rejection_threshold_bps
docs: Rejection threshold: if reject_votes >= this % of total LP supply, proposal is rejected

types.name: QuantityConstraints
docs: Quantity constraints for spending limits

types.name: ReservePriceMapping
docs: Mapping from Kamino reserve pubkey to Exponent price source.

fields.name: reserve
docs: Kamino reserve pubkey from obligation deposits/borrows.

fields.name: reserve_price_id
docs: Price used to convert the reserve mint into the obligation quote mint.
`PriceId::Simple { price_id: 0 }` means passthrough (reserve mint must
equal the quote input mint). Supports `PriceId::Multiply` for chained
conversions (e.g. PT → USX → eUSX).

types.name: SpendingLimitPolicyCreationPayload
docs: Setup parameters for creating a spending limit

types.name: StrategyPosition
docs: Strategy position types for AUM calculation

types.name: TimeConstraints
docs: Configuration for time-based constraints

types.name: TokenAccountBalance
docs: Single token account balance entry with price reference

fields.name: token_account
docs: Token account pubkey holding the tokens

fields.name: price_id
docs: Price calculation method for the parent TokenAccountEntry mint.

fields.name: last_observed_amount
docs: Last token amount observed by AUM refresh or managed validation.

types.name: TokenAccountEntry
docs: Token account entry for tracking multiple token account positions

fields.name: token_mint
docs: Common token mint for all balances in this position

fields.name: balances
docs: Vector of token account balances to track

types.name: TokenEntry
docs: Token entry for deposits/withdrawals

fields.name: mint
docs: Mint of the token

fields.name: price_id
docs: Price reference for this token

fields.name: token_squads_account
docs: Token account owned by squads_vault (the Squads smart account at index 0)
User deposits land here

fields.name: token_account_vault
docs: Token account owned by the vault PDA (receives tokens from squads during fill_withdrawal)

fields.name: last_observed_amount
docs: Last squads-token-account amount observed by AUM refresh or managed validation.

fields.name: force_deallocate_policy_ids
docs: Policy identifiers for forceDeallocate flows

types.name: UpdatePriceInput
docs: Input for updating a single price

fields.name: price_id
docs: The price index (node index in allocator) to update

fields.name: interface_accounts_index
docs: Index into the shared remaining-accounts prefix that contains PriceInterfaceAccounts.

types.name: UsageState
docs: Usage tracking for resource consumption

types.name: VaultConfig
docs: Vault configuration for reserves and withdrawal periods.
Supports two withdrawal period modes via `withdrawal_period`:
- **Interval**: Simple lock time - withdrawals allowed after N seconds from queue time
- **WeeklySchedule**: Withdrawals allowed only on specific days of the week

fields.name: reserves_share_bp
docs: Share of tokens that should be in reserves, in base points (1e4)

fields.name: withdrawal_period
docs: Withdrawal timing configuration.

fields.name: instant_withdrawal_window_limit_bp
docs: Optional instant-withdrawal throughput limit per withdrawal window, in base points.
A value of 0 falls back to `reserves_share_bp`.

fields.name: management_fee_bps
docs: Annualized management fee rate in BPS_PRECISION units.

fields.name: withdrawal_cancel_cooldown_seconds
docs: Minimum time a queued withdrawal must stay open before it can be cancelled.

fields.name: max_swap_slippage_bp
docs: Maximum tracked-token AUM loss allowed for isolated swap interactions.

fields.name: nav_aum_change_threshold_bps
docs: Maximum NAV-per-LP movement allowed per circuit-breaker window, in basis points.

types.name: VaultFinancials
docs: Financial parameters for the market

fields.name: lp_balance
docs: Balance of LP in the market

fields.name: aum_in_base
docs: Pool liquidity invariant

fields.name: aum_in_base_in_positions
docs: Pool liquidity invariant

fields.name: reserved_lp_locked_for_withdrawal
docs: Former duplicate of `total_lp_pending_withdrawals`, kept to preserve layout.

fields.name: pending_management_fee_lp
docs: LP shares accrued for management fees but not yet minted.

fields.name: last_management_fee_accrued_at
docs: Timestamp of the last management-fee accrual checkpoint.

fields.name: pending_withdrawal_backlog_due_at
docs: First withdrawal-window deadline after which open pending withdrawals block new actions.

fields.name: instant_withdrawal_window_end
docs: End timestamp of the current instant-withdrawal window.

fields.name: instant_withdrawal_window_cap_aum
docs: Absolute AUM cap for the current instant-withdrawal window, snapshotted when the window begins.

fields.name: instant_withdrawn_aum_in_window
docs: Base-denominated AUM already withdrawn instantly in the current window.

fields.name: reserved1
docs: reserved for future financial parameters

fields.name: total_lp_staked_in_votes
docs: Total LP amount currently staked across active vote accounts.

fields.name: total_lp_pending_withdrawals
docs: Total LP amount still pending across queued withdrawals.

types.name: VaultFlagAction
docs: Action for setting vault flags

types.name: VaultRoles
docs: Role membership lists for vault governance and operations.

fields.name: manager
docs: Vault creator and initial admin; can create/manage other roles.

fields.name: curator
docs: Configures vault parameters and validation rules via policies.

fields.name: allocator
docs: Executes strategy actions via adapter interface calls.

fields.name: sentinel
docs: Oversees and controls vault risk.

types.name: VoteAccount
docs: Account storing a user's vote on a proposal

fields.name: proposal
docs: The proposal being voted on

fields.name: voter
docs: The voter's address

fields.name: lp_amount
docs: Amount of LP tokens staked for this vote

fields.name: vote
docs: The vote choice

fields.name: opt_out_withdrawal_queued
docs: Whether opt-out withdrawal has been queued (for OptOut voters)

fields.name: voted_at
docs: Timestamp when vote was cast

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: reserved
docs: Reserved for future use

types.name: VoteChoice
docs: Vote choice for a proposal (rejection-based voting)
Actions are approved by default after timelock unless rejected

types.name: WithdrawalPeriodSettings
docs: Withdrawal timing settings.
Only the fields for the active mode are serialized.

types.name: YieldPositionEntry
docs: Entry for tracking YieldTokenPosition from exponent_core.
Used to track YT holdings and their value in the vault.

fields.name: yield_position
docs: The YieldTokenPosition PDA from exponent_core

fields.name: vault
docs: The exponent_core vault this position belongs to

fields.name: price_id_pt
docs: Price ID for the PT token.

fields.name: price_id_sy
docs: Price ID for the SY token.
